description: Style Note Crafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this clutch from hidekraft makes for a perfect addition to your handbag. Product Details Black wallet with pink piping has a buttoned flap to secure the wallet One main compartment with four separators, a zippered pocket on the spine of the clutch, six card holders and a slip pocket under the flap A flap at the back Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight Size Dimensions: 10 cm x 18 cm
